thinking:
**Examining the Image Closely**

I'm carefully analyzing the image provided, keeping in mind the user's feedback. I'm focusing specifically on the button's position relative to the symbol and also paying close attention to the desired color change (#533af6). It seems like the core challenge now is ensuring perfect alignment of the button illumination with the symbol.


**Pinpointing the Offset**

I've zeroed in on the offset issue with the "DASHBOARD" tooltip. It's clear that the dark hover balloon is shifted right, relative to the sidebar. The violet sidebar sits to the left, and the tooltip's starting point is offset horizontally, exposing the lighter purple icon on the sidebar. I'm investigating the root cause, which seems tied to the `relative` container's `flex justify-center` conflicting with the tooltip's `absolute left-[16px]` positioning and `justify-start`.


**Calculating the Width**

I've determined the misalignment is due to padding on the sidebar. The desktop sidebar's effective width is only 48px, considering the 16px padding on each side. Therefore, the container for the `SidebarItem` has that reduced width. This explains why the tooltip is offset and the light purple icon remains visible on the left.


**Unraveling the Offset**

I've finally cracked the tooltip offset mystery! The core lies within the nested structure: a `SidebarItem` with `w-full` inside the `<aside>`. This `w-full` is effectively 48px because of the sidebar's padding. The button, `lg:w-12`, perfectly fills this space. Placing the tooltip's `left-[16px]` translates to 16px from the *item's* border (which starts at 16px from the sidebar's padding), thus causing the 16px offset! The tooltip's starting point is at coordinate 32px!


**Refining the Tooltip Alignment**

I've determined that the `left-0` setting is the key to perfectly aligning the tooltip with the button's left edge. The existing `left-[16px]` positioning causes a misalignment because the button already occupies the container's full width. To ensure the tooltip icon is precisely over the original, I'll set its left padding to `pl-[15px]`. This is derived from the original button width (48px) and icon width (18px), ensuring the icons overlap.

\n\n

**Implementing the Color Change**

I'm now addressing the user's color request; they want the tooltip to illuminate with `#533af6`. I'll use `bg-[#533af6]` on the tooltip's background, and apply the same color as the hover effect of the tooltip in the sidebar. This aligns with the site's primary blue.


**Implementing the Color Change**

I've determined the exact CSS classes needed for the tooltip's visual overhaul. The solution is straightforward: using `bg-[#533af6]` on the tooltip's background, alongside a subtle blue shadow `shadow-[0_10px_25px_rgba(83,58,246,0.3)]` and no border, for a clean look. I'll extend this change to the "Configurações" and "Sair" tooltips, aligning their look to a vibrant, uniform aesthetic with the rest of the application.

args.Description: "Corrigir posição (left-0) e alterar a cor para #533af6 no tooltip do SidebarItem no CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change the left property in tooltip from left-[16px] to left-0, and change the background color of tooltip from bg-slate-950 to bg-[#533af6] in CompanyDashboard.tsx."
args.ReplacementContent:
"const SidebarItem = ({ icon: Icon, label, activeTab, setActiveTab }: SidebarItemProps) => (
{/* Balão/Tooltip flutuante de sobreposição perfeita no desktop */}
setActiveTab(label)} className="absolute left-0 top-0 h-12 hidden lg:flex items-center justify-start bg-[#533af6] text-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_10px_25px_rgba(83,58,246,0.3)] cursor-pointer pointer-events-none opacity-0 group-hover/item:opacity-100 group-hover/item:pointer-events-auto transition-all duration-200 z-[110] w-auto whitespace-nowrap pl-[15px] pr-6 gap-3" > {label}
);"
args.TargetContent:
"const SidebarItem = ({ icon: Icon, label, activeTab, setActiveTab }: SidebarItemProps) => (
{/* Balão/Tooltip flutuante de sobreposição perfeita no desktop */}
setActiveTab(label)} className="absolute left-[16px] top-0 h-12 hidden lg:flex items-center justify-start bg-slate-950 text-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_15px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] border border-slate-800/50 cursor-pointer pointer-events-none opacity-0 group-hover/item:opacity-100 group-hover/item:pointer-events-auto transition-all duration-200 z-[110] w-auto whitespace-nowrap pl-[15px] pr-6 gap-3" > {label}
);"
args.toolAction: "Corrigindo posicionamento e cor do tooltip do SidebarItem no CompanyDashboard.tsx"
